request: Every checkout on our storefront is failing with 'payment declined' since 09:00 UTC. Customers cannot pay and we are losing sales by the minute.

expected_output.summary: Storefront-wide payment failures blocking all checkouts

request: I can't sign in via our Okta SSO — it loops back to the login page. My teammate on the same tenant logs in fine, so it seems specific to my account.

expected_output.summary: Single user stuck in Okta SSO login loop

request: The CSV export produces a file where every row after ~10k is shifted one column to the left, so the data is misaligned and unusable for our finance import.

expected_output.summary: CSV export misaligns columns past 10k rows

request: How do I invite a teammate to my workspace and give them read-only access to a single project rather than everything?

expected_output.summary: Wants steps to invite a read-only project member

request: Not a problem exactly — just wanted to say the new dashboard is great, and to ask whether you plan to add a dark theme at some point.

expected_output.summary: Positive feedback plus a dark-theme feature question

request: Our latest invoice charges for 12 seats but we only have 9 active users. Can you explain the discrepancy and adjust if it's wrong?

expected_output.summary: Invoice bills 12 seats but only 9 users active

request: Our entire company is locked out — SSO returns 'SAML assertion invalid' for everyone since your maintenance window. Nobody can work.

expected_output.summary: Org-wide SSO outage: SAML assertion invalid for all users

request: Minor thing: the tooltip on the Save button overlaps the icon and is slightly cut off in Safari. Everything still works.

expected_output.summary: Save-button tooltip clipped in Safari; cosmetic only
